narrative:
Jackson Township A (precinct in Clermont County) has 696 registered voters, with 53.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 32.6 percentage points.
